SUPER_ADMIN.description: Root access to all modules and configurations

ADMIN.description: Administrative control over users, roles, and system logs

BUSINESS.description: Standard talent portal actions, verified repository analysis, and recruiter search

USER.description: Standard developer portal access to publish repository credentials, build evidence graphs, and utilize AI analysis

system.description: Full access to all resources and commands

admin.name: admin:users:view
admin.description: Allows search, pagination, and listing of administrative user accounts

admin.name: admin:users:manage
admin.description: Allows inviting, onboarding, suspending, or reassigning roles on administrators

admin.name: admin:roles:view
admin.description: Allows viewing security roles and dynamic permission mapping matrices

admin.name: admin:roles:manage
admin.description: Allows creating, updating, and deleting dynamic administrative roles

admin.name: admin:verification:view
admin.description: Allows reading system-wide verified repository audit logs

admin.name: admin:verification:manage
admin.description: Allows overriding verification status, clearing fraud flags, and managing claims

admin.name: admin:ai:audit
admin.description: Allows reviewing prompt execution logs, system safety flags, and token cost usage

admin.name: admin:components:read
admin.description: Allows viewing visual platform component architecture and dependency graphs

verification.name: verification:view:list
verification.description: Allows reading verified repository audit summaries and evaluation logs

verification.name: verification:update:status
verification.description: Allows modifying candidate repository evaluation lifecycle status states

ai.name: ai:chat:use
ai.description: Allows sending prompt parameters and receiving dynamic planner streams

evidence.name: evidence:graph:view
evidence.description: Allows viewing assigned or public professional contribution graphs

evidence.name: evidence:graph:create
evidence.description: Allows generating new technical contribution graphs

evidence.name: evidence:graph:edit
evidence.description: Allows editing own developer evidence graphs

evidence.name: evidence:collaborator:join
evidence.description: Allows joining shared peer assessment and code collaboration boards

evidence.name: evidence:collaborator:comment
evidence.description: Allows providing technical validation comments on candidate evidence graph blocks
